scripts.ensure:search-index: if [ ! -f public/_pagefind/pagefind.js ]; then if [ -f .next/server/app/index.html ]; then pnpm run build:search-index; else pnpm build; fi; fi
scripts.build:search-index: rm -rf public/_pagefind public/fragment public/index public/pagefind* public/wasm.*.pagefind && pagefind --site .next/server/app --output-path public/_pagefind --root-selector "[data-pagefind-body]"
